title: CK-12 Algebra I FlexBooks
description: A link-only discovery card for CK-12 Algebra I textbooks and study resources.

usagePolicy.reason: CK-12 currently restricts content aggregation and AI/ML use without permission.

pages.text: CK-12 Algebra I materials cover real numbers, equations, inequalities, functions, lines, systems, exponents, polynomials, quadratics, and data.
Open CK-12 FlexBooks and search for Algebra I. Students can use the official examples, interactives, and adaptive practice.
Link only: CK-12 curriculum text is not mirrored or sent to AlloFlow AI features. Open the official CK-12 site to read, customize, or assign the material.
